intro:
Arrah (Ara) is the headquarters of Bhojpur district in Bihar, a historically significant town with a growing residential and commercial market along the Patna–Varanasi corridor. Radhe packers and movers connects you with 280+ KYC-verified packers and movers covering every locality across Arrah.

Get instant quotes, compare vendors side by side, and book in minutes — with transparent pricing and zero hidden charges.
whyUs: Arrah's location on the Grand Trunk Road makes it accessible for intercity moves to Patna and Varanasi. Our verified partners plan every move for efficiency — whether it's a local 1 BHK shift or a long-distance relocation from Arrah. ₹5 lakh damage protection, live GPS tracking, and pay-after-delivery on every booking.

faqs.q: What does a local move cost in Arrah?
faqs.a: 1 BHK from ₹2,500. 2 BHK typically ₹4,000 – ₹8,000 depending on distance, floor, and packing.

faqs.q: Do you cover all areas in Arrah?
faqs.a: Yes — our vendor network covers all residential colonies, societies, and commercial zones across Arrah and its outskirts.

faqs.q: Is insurance included with every booking?
faqs.a: Yes. ₹5 lakh damage protection is included automatically with every Radhe packers and movers booking at no extra charge.
